# Change Shipping Address

The delivery address can be edited until the order reaches the packing stage, after which the destination is locked. If an address must change after that point, support can sometimes intercept the parcel with the carrier for a five-dollar redirection fee, though interception is not guaranteed once the parcel is in transit.

[Source: order_management.md#change-shipping-address]
